commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the canvas tool symlink escape test to probe file-symlink support at runtime instead of skipping the test on every Windows host.

PR surface: Tests +16. Total +16 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main skips the canvas symlink escape regression on all Windows hosts at extensions/canvas/src/tool.test.ts:44. I did not run a Windows host, so the PR's claimed positive Windows path still needs contributor proof.
